.github/workflows/build.yml.general_idea: Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the build job.
Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the test job.
Update GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 for the container registry login job.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or comply with the migration goal.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.source to 21 to ensure source code is parsed as Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler may reject Java 21 syntax or fail to enforce Java 21 source compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven.compiler.target to 21 to ensure bytecode is generated for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the generated bytecode will be incompatible with Java 21 runtime expectations or will not leverage Java 21 optimizations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the release configuration to maven-compiler-plugin to enforce cross-compilation settings.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the compiler might not strictly enforce the target release version, potentially leading to API usage mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jacoco.version to 0.8.15-SNAPSHOT to support Java 21 instrumentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions may fail to instrument or report coverage for Java 21 class files.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin.version to 3.15.1-SNAPSHOT to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not fully support Java 21 compilation features or may have bugs with newer JDKs.
